---
title: "The Rev. Sir George Prevost 2nd Bt."
---

## The Rev. Sir George Prevost 2nd Bt.

**Dates:** (1804-1893)

### Description

curate of Stinchcombe, Glos..

### Biography

He married (1828) Jane Williams, sister of Isaac Williams.

### Letters

- Letter from March 14. 1849

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
